title: A Breath of Scandal
writer: Walter Bernstein, Sidney Howard, Ring Lardner Jr.
actors: Sophia Loren, Maurice Chevalier, John Gavin
plot: Princess Olympia (Sophia Loren), despite her life status cannot resist the urge to satisfy her sexual appetites. Exiled to the countryside, Olympia falls in love with American millionaire Charlie Foster (John Gavin).
